response.overview: Nearly two decades after the unexplained disappearance of a vlogger in England’s Epping Forest, a documentary crew ventures into the same woods to uncover the truth—only to find themselves drawn into a chilling mystery where folklore, grief, and the act of filming begin to blur the line between reality and something far more sinister.
response.tagline: What happened to Elliott Cornell in the Summer of 2007?
response.title: Sea of Trees
